visual_summary: A simple text animation component that scales up when the text is shown. Typically used for emphasizing text or creating interactive effects. Good for adding visual interest to a webpage.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Animate Demo 4
Description: A simple text animation component that scales up when the text is shown. Typically used for emphasizing text or creating interactive effects. Good for adding visual interest to a webpage.
Style: Minimal
Interactions: Animated, Hover
Tags: Text Animation, Magic UI

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextAnimate } from "@/registry/magicui/text-animate"

export default function TextAnimateDemo4() {
  return (
    <TextAnimate animation="scaleUp" by="text">
      Scale up by text
    </TextAnimate>
  )
}
